name: forge
description: TDD-driven coding agent with configurable multi-model orchestration. Writes tests first, implements second, and proves everything with evidence. Adversarial multi-model review, verification cascade, and organized commits with user approval.

reasoning.description: Deep reasoning: planning, test design, deep adversarial review

review.description: Bug finding: adversarial code review, security analysis

standard.description: Routine tasks: commit organization, formatting, simple analysis

fast.description: Cheap and quick: simple formulaic tasks where speed/cost matters most
